zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期承压整理，关注支撑反弹机会
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格位于 $2003.8，较 SMA(20) 2022.25 略低，显示短期均线压力存在，多空力量略偏空。价格波动幅度有限，近期高低点集中在 $2007.64 与 $2003.7，暗示市场短期缺乏强烈趋势，可能处于震荡整合阶段。

MACD 为 -4.34，表明空方动能依然存在，但缺少 Signal 值确认交叉信号，需要结合价格行为谨慎观察。若出现 MACD 向零回升并伴随价格突破 SMA(20)，可视为多头回归信号。RSI 数据缺失，但可通过观察价格接近支撑/阻力判断超买超卖情况。

短期支撑位初步位于 $2000 附近，若跌破可能触发进一步下探至 $1980；阻力位在 SMA(20) 及前高 $2025-2030 区间，突破将打开进一步上涨空间。价格在支撑附近形成企稳信号，可考虑低位布局，反之在阻力区域谨慎减仓。

交易建议上，短线可以震荡策略为主，低多高空操作，控制仓位，关注 SMA(20) 及支撑位的价格反应。中线投资者应等待趋势确认再加仓，避免在窄幅整理区段追涨杀跌，同时留意市场整体情绪与宏观消息对价格的扰动。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2003.8, showing mild bearish pressure after a 24-hour decline of 0.21%. The price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 2022.25, indicating that short-term momentum favors sellers. Recent trading activity has been confined to a very narrow range between 2003.7 and 2007.64, reflecting a lack of strong directional conviction and suggesting the market is waiting for a catalyst before establishing its next significant move.

The relationship between price and the SMA(20) is currently the most relevant technical signal. Trading below this moving average often points to a weakening trend and reduced buying interest. Meanwhile, the MACD value of -4.34 supports the bearish bias, indicating that downside momentum remains present. Although the signal line and RSI readings are unavailable, the negative MACD reading suggests that bullish momentum has not yet regained control of the market.

Key support is located around the recent low near 2003.7, with a more important psychological support zone around 2000. A decisive break below this area could expose Ethereum to additional selling pressure and potentially accelerate downside movement. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 2008, while the SMA(20) around 2022 serves as a stronger resistance level. A sustained move above 2022 would improve the technical outlook and signal a potential shift back toward bullish momentum.

From a trading perspective, cautious positioning remains appropriate while price stays below the 20-period moving average. Short-term traders may look for selling opportunities on rallies toward resistance, particularly if momentum indicators remain weak. More conservative participants may prefer to wait for either a confirmed break above 2022 or a clear rebound from the 2000 support zone before considering long exposure. Risk management remains essential, as the current consolidation phase could precede a sharp directional breakout.
